series_metadata.series_title: Administrative Records from a Closed Community School
series_metadata.series_description: When a Community School sponsored by the Office of School Sponsorship closes, all of the administrative records of the school are transferred to the Office School Sponsorship. These include, but are not limited to: records pertaining to employees; food services; transportation; finances; and other administrative functions and/or services of the school.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: three (3) years from date of closure or final audit is complete (whichever is later) ; Paper: three (3) years from date of closure or final audit is complete (whichever is later)
